message:
chore: close bd-2el (headless smoke mode)

Headless smoke mode now exercises the full render pipeline:
- Creates App with proper config
- Runs N frames through all render passes
- Computes BufferDiff between frames
- Outputs HEADLESS_SMOKE_OK with frame/cell counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
